name: Salmon Quinoa Salad
tagline: Flaked salmon on quinoa with cucumber, herbs, lemon-tahini
highlight: Make-ahead lunch bowl — improves overnight, no shellfish

hero.alt: Quinoa salad with flaked salmon, cucumber, herbs
hero.caption: salmon quinoa — bright bowl

healthFacts: Salmon + quinoa = complete protein with omega-3s and slow carbs.
Tahini adds calcium and rounds out the lemon's brightness.

steps.title: Cook quinoa
steps.detail: Combine quinoa with 2 cups water and a pinch of salt. Bring to a boil; simmer covered 15 min. Rest 5 min, fluff. Cool slightly.
steps.tip: Rinsing quinoa first removes saponins (the bitter coating).

steps.title: Cook the salmon
steps.detail: Brush salmon with olive oil, salt, pepper. Roast at 400°F for 12 min, or pan-sear, until just cooked. Let cool, flake into chunks.
steps.tip: Cooked salmon flakes cleanly if you push parallel to the lines, not across.

steps.title: Whisk lemon-tahini
steps.detail: Whisk tahini, lemon juice, grated garlic, salt, and 3–4 tbsp water until pourable.
steps.tip: Tahini will seize, then loosen with more water — don't panic.

steps.title: Fold and finish
steps.detail: Toss quinoa with cucumber, tomatoes, onion, herbs, half the tahini sauce. Gently fold in flaked salmon. Drizzle remaining sauce on top.
steps.tip: Hold dressing back when packing for tomorrow's lunch — wait until eating.
